raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tafakka tas KUNGS:
Weens Balknuts irr dsir dehts
eekſch Rahnas/ weena Noscheh-
loſchana un gauscha Naudafcha-
na/ Raële rand pahr ſaweem
Behrneem / winna ne taujahs
eepreezinacees pahr ſaweeim Behr-
neem/ ka tee newa wairs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Taſakka tas KUNGS:
Atrauji tawn Balti no Rauda-
tchanas/ un tawaes Azziſ no Af-
sarahm / jo ta Alga irr tur
preekſch tawa Darba/ ſakka tas
KUNGS : Jo tee atgreeſifees
no ta Eenaidneeka Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas pehz teewim buhs/
teem irr (dauds Labbuma)
jagaida/ jaka tas KUNGS:
Jo tawi Behrni nahks attak us
fawahm Rohbeschahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſmu klaufcht klaus-
ſijs/ ka Getvräins schehlojahs/
tu eſti manni pahrmahztijs / un
eb eſmu pahrmahzihts / ka ne-
apraddis Tetſch. Atgreeſ man-
ni/ tad tapſchu es atgreeſts. Jo
tu eſti tas KUNGS mans
Dreews.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teekham/ pehz kad es at-
greests tappu/ tad nahze man
Noschehlums/ un pehz kad es to
eſmu tajuttis/ tad fischu es uſ
manneem Gurneem/ jo es eſmu
apkaunohts/ un Kauna tappis/
pazeesdams to Neewaschunu
mannas Jaunibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neg Getvräims man irr
weens dahrs Dehts/ un weens
dischans Behrus? Jo kamehr es
us winnu eſmu runnajs / pee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "minnu es winna peeminnedat
tapebz truhſt manna Sir-
pahr winnu/ es apschelodam
pahr winnu apscheloschob
fakka tas KUNGS.
Uſzelli preekſch tew
Kappu-Sihmes/ leez tew Ru-
tuma-Mehrkus / un leez ta-
Sirđi us to staigatu Zelftu/
tu eſti statgajs/ atgreeſees ak
fraēta Jumprawa ! atgreeſ
uhsſcheem taweeim Pilſtahtee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Zik ilai tu maldifees/
atkahpaja Meita ? Jo
KUNGS irr weenu jaunu
 tu raddijs wirs Semmes / w
naSeewifschka apdohs to Wih
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta ſakka tas KUNG
Zebnot / tas Israēta Dee-
Scho Wahrdiu tee wehl runn-
eekſch tahs Semmes Juha/
winnas Pilſfahtdes/ kad es w
xa Zeetumu atgreeſichu. Lat
KUNGS tewi fwehti/ tu Ma-
jas-Weeta tahs Taifnibus/
fwehts Kalns.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Juha ar wiﬀe-
winnas Pilſfahteen dſthwo-
eekſch tahs kohpā/ tee Arra-
un kas ar gannameem Pullee-
staiga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es peedsirdinaſchu
peekuffufchu Dwehfeli / un
dischu iſkatru noskummaſ-
Dwehfelt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Us to es uhſmohdo-
un peeraudſijn/ un mans Me-
bija man garđs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ tahs Dee-
nahks/ fakka tas KUNGS:
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
